name: Storage Gateway Mandate
description: Storage gateway mandate starbridge-app: StorageOp GET/PUT/LIST, prefix authorization, clearance labels, and Stingray volume budget. Maps Lean StorageGatewayMandate theorems to Rust slot caveats and predicate-layer admission checks.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.publish: Signature (the gateway cell is a dregg:// sturdyref a peer on another federation reacquires)

affordances.get: cap-only, Signature (a READER reads an object)
affordances.list: cap-only, Signature (a READER enumerates a prefix)
affordances.put: GATED (cap∧state), Either — budget-remaining precondition (VOLUME_SPENT < VOLUME_CEILING); the fire submits the FULL metered write (key + op + new spend) reading the LIVE VOLUME_SPENT, the executor re-enforcing FieldLteField(VOLUME_SPENT <= VOLUME_CEILING) + Monotonic(VOLUME_SPENT)

deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the seeded gateway cell carrying the volume invariants (WriteOnce anchor/ceiling/prefix/compartment + Monotonic(VOLUME_SPENT) + FieldLteField(VOLUME_SPENT<=VOLUME_CEILING)), so the volume budget is a LIVE gate: an OVER-BUDGET write (spend pushed past the ceiling) and a REWOUND meter (spend rolled back to forge free budget) BITE in the deos fire path (tests/deos_seam.rs)
